title: WorkTrace platform user registry — v1
description: Source of truth for who's on the platform. One row per teammate. Maintained by `dpsetup` and admin edits. Each user can write their own row; only admins may delete others'.

user_id.description: Slug identifier; used in file paths. Stable forever.

github_login.description: GitHub username; used for CODEOWNERS enforcement in Phase 4.

active.description: False = offboarded; their historical data may stay visible with an inactive badge.

modules_enabled.description: Module IDs this user has opted into. Empty array = registered but no data being pushed.
